name: PT Era Mandiri Cemerlang Tbk
summary: PT Era Mandiri Cemerlang Tbk operates in the processing and trade sectors of fishery products in Indonesia and internationally. The company produces and supplies seafood products. It offers mahi-mahi, tuna, swordfish, oilfish, red snapper, grouper, and octopus products. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Era Mandiri Cemerlang Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Berkah Delapan Samudera.
